training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

artifact_usage_claims.usage: verifies source-backed /home/Models/AIDO.Cell-100M directory is present; uses official cached AIDO embedding dimensions in the input features
preserves official split, target order, and DEG labels

pipeline_program.representation: official cached AIDO embedding branch plus auxiliary/GNN cached branch inherited from parent features
pipeline_program.perturbation_side: AIDO.Cell-100M cached feature segment with gated auxiliary fusion
pipeline_program.head: direct DEG head plus low-rank target factor head
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: planned AIDO cached embedding fusion using source-backed AIDO model directory and official cached features; no proxy/fallback
